Generators package

Submodules

Generators.AtmosphericMuons module

class Generators.AtmosphericMuons.MuonGenerator(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any)

Bases: I3Module

Creates atmospheric muons with energy/angle distributions from a CSV file. For each frame, one muon is generated.

Configure()
DAQ(frame)
class Generators.AtmosphericMuons.MuonReweighter(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any)

Bases: MuonGenerator

Reweights muons created with MuonGenerator. Takes CSV file with new flux, and adds I3Double to each frame with new muon weight.

Configure()
DAQ(frame)
Simulation(frame)
